title: useEffect Basics
description: Learn the syntax and when useEffect runs.

slides.title: The useEffect Hook 🎣
Try It Yourself
slides.content: Here's the code again. Notice that the effect runs after the component renders.

quizData.question: When does a useEffect with no dependency array run?

options.text: Only once after the initial render
Only when a state variable changes

quizData.explanation: Without a dependency array, useEffect runs after every render (including the first).
